history.content:
<thought>
The goal O is located two rows up and two columns to the right of my current position. However, the cell directly in front of me (north) is lava, so I cannot move forward. The cell to my right (east) is a floor cell, which is safe. I will turn clockwise to face east and then move into that safe cell.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The agent is currently facing east, but the cell directly ahead is a wall. The goal is to the north-west. To move towards the goal, I need to face north. Turning counter-clockwise will orient me north, and then the cell in front (north) is a safe floor cell.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The agent is currently facing north, and the cell directly ahead is lava (L). The goal (O) is two rows up and two columns to the right of my position. To move toward the goal, I need to go east first, as the cell to my right is a safe floor cell. I will turn clockwise to face east.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
Currently facing east, but the cell directly ahead (east) is a wall (#). The cell to the north is a safe floor (.). To move towards the goal, I need to go north first. So I will turn counter-clockwise to face north.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
From the initial observation, the cell directly ahead (north) is lava, so moving forward is not possible. To the east is a safe floor cell. Turning clockwise will orient me east, making that floor cell the new forward direction and updating the egocentric view. This will allow me to then move forward toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at position (row7, col4) facing east. The goal is at (row5, col2) to the northwest. The cell directly north is safe floor (.), which is the first step toward a viable path: north to (6,4), then west to (6,3), west to (6,2), then north to the goal. I need to face north to move forward, so I will turn counter-clockwise.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The goal O is visible three cells ahead and three cells to the right of my location. The cell in front of me is a deadly lava cell, so I cannot move forward. I will turn clockwise to head to the free neighbor cell at my right.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am facing north. The cell directly ahead is safe (.), leading toward the goal. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>FRENTE</action>

<thought>
I am at (1,0) facing east. The goal O is at (2,2). The cell directly in front (east) is safe, but the cell north of it is lava. A direct path north then east is safe: move north to (1,1) (which is '.'), then north to (1,2) ('.'), then east to (2,2) (goal). I need to turn counter-clockwise to face north first.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am facing north. The cell directly in front is a floor cell, which is safe. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am facing north. The cell directly in front is a floor cell, which is safe. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE</action>

<thought>
I am facing north. The cell directly in front is a wall (#), so I cannot move forward. The goal (O) is immediately to my right (east). I will turn clockwise to face east, then move forward onto the goal.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am facing east. The goal O is directly north of my current position (one cell up). To move onto it, I need to face north. I will turn counter-clockwise to face north, then move forward.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>

</thought>

<thought>
The goal O is directly to my right (east) in the current view. I am facing north, as the view's top is forward. The cell ahead is a wall, so I cannot go there. To reach the goal, I need to turn clockwise to face east, then move forward onto the goal.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
